What We Do

DTF Apparel
Full-color transfers on any fabric. Tees, hoodies, hats — if it takes heat, we print it.
FROM $27 / PIECE
✨
Specialty HTV
Flock, chrome, glitter, puff, glow-in-dark, reflective, metallic, foil, brick and more.
FROM $45 / PIECE
🏷️
Vinyl & Stickers
Decals, sticker sheets, die-cuts. Indoor/outdoor. Any shape, any size.
FROM $5 / SHEET
🎽
Team Orders
Bulk pricing for sports teams, schools, events, and businesses. The more you order, the better the price.

🌈
Sublimation
All-over prints, drinkware, phone cases, mousepads — dye-sub quality that lasts.
FROM $20 / PIECE
🎂
Event & Decor
Birthday cutouts, custom lanyards, patches, and party decor. We make your event pop.

Got Questions?
FAQ

PNG or PDF works best — at least 300 DPI, on a transparent or white background. If you don't have a file, just describe your idea and we'll quote the design fee (usually $10–25). You can also text your design directly to (801) 410-0490.

Yes! Bring your own shirts, hoodies, or other items and we'll print or press them for you. Just contact us for transfer-only pricing — starts at $4/transfer.

Both! Local pickup is free in Ogden, Utah. We also ship nationwide — shipping cost is calculated at checkout based on order size and destination.

Our minimum order is $15. There's no minimum quantity — you can order just 1 shirt if you want. Pricing scales down the more you order.

Standard turnaround is 3–5 business days after artwork approval and deposit received. Rush orders (next 1–2 days) are available for +20–30% and depend on current workload — contact us first to confirm availability.

Venmo, Cash App, and cash. A 50% deposit is required to start your order, with the balance due at pickup or before shipping.

Chrome, glitter, flock, puff, glow-in-dark, reflective, metallic, foil, brick, and fluorescent. Ask about combining effects for a one-of-a-kind piece.
